title: aerides coriacea
intro: Aerides coriacea, commonly known as the Aerides orchid, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and lower blood pressure. The health benefits of Aerides coriacea include its potential to improve respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, have been used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
